{{- /* Give every Markdown table the theme's .table styling inside a scrollable, bordered .table-responsive wrapper, so rows and columns have visible dividers and wide tables scroll instead of overflowing on narrow screens. Many-column matrix tables get --matrix, which keeps cells on one line so the wrapper scrolls horizontally on phones rather than cramming columns together. */ -}} {{- $cols := 0 -}} {{- with .THead -}}{{- $cols = len (index . 0) -}}{{- end -}}
{{- range .THead }} {{- range . }} {{ .Text }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- range .TBody }} {{- range . }} {{ .Text }} {{- end }} {{- end }}
